findings.location: s1 — 一括更新処理における更新チェック（主キーが組み合わせキーではない場合）
findings.description: Source contains a subsection explaining bulk update exclusive control for non-composite primary keys using overloaded methods that accept a request parameter name. This entire subsection is absent from s1.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines: 'HttpExclusiveControlUtil.checkVersions(request, context, "user.deactivate")' and 'HttpExclusiveControlUtil.updateVersionsWithCheck(request, "user.deactivate")' — overloads that accept a request parameter name string to restrict version-check targets to only the selected records. Also includes a note that the checkbox value must be set to the primary key of the update target record.

findings.location: s1 — 一括更新処理における更新チェック（主キーが組み合わせキーの場合）
findings.description: Source contains a subsection explaining bulk update exclusive control for composite primary keys using singular-form methods checkVersion() and updateVersionWithCheck() (without 's'), called per record in a loop. This entire subsection is absent from s1.
findings.source_evidence: Source specifies: use 'HttpExclusiveControlUtil.checkVersion(request, context, new UsersExclusiveControl(...))' and 'HttpExclusiveControlUtil.updateVersionWithCheck(request, new UsersExclusiveControl(...))' (both singular, taking an ExclusiveControlContext argument) per record in a for-loop. Also provides: (1) a SQL CREATE TABLE example with a 3-column composite PK (USER_ID, PK2, PK3) and a VERSION column; (2) a full UsersExclusiveControl class implementation extending ExclusiveControlContext using an enum PK and appendCondition(); (3) an HTML checkbox example using name='user.userCompositeKeys' with composite key values; (4) a note referencing WebView_CompositeKeyCheckboxTag, WebView_CompositeKeyRadioButtonTag, and nablarch.common.web.compositekey.CompositeKey; (5) a note that checkbox values must be composite key fields joined by a delimiter that cannot appear in key values, and that the form class must implement logic to extract keys from request parameters.

findings.description: Hints for s1 are missing key identifiers from the bulk update sections: singular-form method names checkVersion and updateVersionWithCheck, the UsersExclusiveControl example class, and CompositeKey-related class names referenced in the source.
